name: ExtensionAppointment_Class
title: R5: Classification when becoming an encounter (new)
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `Appointment.class` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`Appointment.class` 0..* `CodeableConcept`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
*  R5: `Appointment.class` 0..* `CodeableConcept`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `Appointment.class` has a context of Appointment based on following the parent source element upwards and mapping to `Appointment`.
Element `Appointment.class` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

element.short: R5: Classification when becoming an encounter (new)
element.comment:
Element `Appointment.class` has a context of Appointment based on following the parent source element upwards and mapping to `Appointment`.
Element `Appointment.class` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

element.definition: Concepts representing classification of patient encounter such as ambulatory (outpatient), inpatient, emergency, home health or others due to local variations.
